title: Write a formal request email
subtitle: Ask for information or change.
overview: Use polite frames from A2, but add context.
B1 emails explain reason and desired outcome.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Me pongo en contacto con usted porque...
I would appreciate it if you could...
I look forward to your reply.

items.es: Me pongo en contacto con usted porque necesito cambiar mi reserva.
items.en: I am contacting you because I need to change my reservation.

items.es: La reserva está a nombre de Daniel y es para el viernes.
items.en: The reservation is under the name Daniel and is for Friday.

items.es: Le agradecería si pudiera cambiarla al sábado.
items.en: I would appreciate it if you could change it to Saturday.

items.es: Adjunto el número de reserva para facilitar la búsqueda.
items.en: I attach the reservation number to make the search easier.
I look forward to your reply.
